_template: Shape of `.deep-skills/<effort>/04-Code-Review/findings.json` — a JSON object with a `findings` array. Annotations live in `_doc` keys here; real findings.json files omit every key starting with `_`. Numeric `severity` is CANONICAL; `tier` is derived presentation vocabulary (9-10 Blocker, 7-8 Major, 5-6 Minor, 1-4 Nit). Shape is kept compatible with a thin future bridge to an in-app finding importer — no app coupling here, just stable fields.

findings._doc_id: CR-NNN, sequential within this review; stable across report.md / findings.json / certificate.md
findings._doc_lens: one of: correctness | last-mile | plan-conformance | coherence | pre-pass
findings._doc_dimension: null in the default single-agent review; under --multi-agent a finder pass id (diff-scan | removed-behavior | seam-trace | frozen-state-probe | quality; the four lens passes keep null), or an array of ids when synthesis merged a cross-pass root cause
findings._doc_verification: multi-agent only: confirmed | plausible; unverified when no verifier ran (single-agent mode, or below multi-agent's sev>=5 verification floor). Refuted candidates are never stored as findings — they appear only in report.md's Refuted-candidates appendix.
findings.title: Save chain severed: POST target route never registered
findings._doc_evidence: REQUIRED. At least one of path(+line), symbol, observed. `path` is repo-relative; `line` optional; `symbol` a named function/class/member; `observed` a behavior seen by tooling (pre-pass output, browser traffic). Last-mile findings put the hop-by-hop chain summary in `observed` or the recommendation.

evidence.observed: Chain breaks at hop 4: saveTrack() POSTs /api/tracks; no such route registered (routes/ contains only /api/track-templates)

findings.recommendation: Register the /api/tracks POST route and wire it to the existing handler, or correct the service URL.
findings._doc_status: open (pre-triage) -> accepted | deferred | rejected by user; accepted findings may later become fixed. Blockers are auto-accepted (no triage; user informed).
